error_signature: Todoist API expects an array of strings
title: Incorrect label format for Todoist API
symptom: When attempting to set labels from AI in Todoist, an error occurs, but manual label selection works fine.
not_this_if: Labels are manually selected without AI assistance
root_cause: The Todoist API requires labels to be provided as an array of strings. If labels are generated as a single string instead, the API will not accept the input, leading to errors.
fix_steps: Modify the AI output to generate a comma-separated string of labels
Use the JavaScript function `.split(',').map((s) => s.trim())` to convert the string into an array of trimmed labels
Update the Todoist node with the new array format
agent_instruction: Ensure the labels are formatted as an array of strings before sending to the Todoist API.
